desc: We are not just working on batteries. We're wiring AI into every layer of how batteries are understood, tested, managed, and extended.

cards.title: Battery Digital Twins
cards.desc: AI models that mirror real battery behavior in software, predicting degradation and end-of-life before they happen in hardware.

cards.title: Predictive Analytics Platform
cards.desc: Fleet-scale SOH tracking across thousands of batteries using ML pipelines built on real telecom and BESS deployment data.

cards.title: AI-Driven Materials Research
cards.desc: Using machine learning to explore electrode and electrolyte chemistries and accelerate discovery of safer, higher-density battery materials.

cards.title: Second-Life Battery Intelligence
cards.desc: AI-powered grading and routing for retired battery packs, extending value through smart repurposing in grid storage and industrial use.

cards.title: Smart Grid and V2G Optimization
cards.desc: Intelligent dispatching for battery fleets and EV infrastructure, reading energy markets and weather in real time to optimize charge decisions.

cards.title: Manufacturing Yield AI
cards.desc: ML monitoring for gigafactory production lines, catching defects in coating thickness and cell formation before they become failures at scale.
